title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: TABLE ROCK ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 2830 Maple Court White City, OR 97503 Eligibility: All enrolled students are eligible to receive services. Siblings of enrolled students can also be seen for acute care. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 7:45am-2:30pm, Wednesday 8:45am-2:30pm Email (541) 500-0978 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 500-0978 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-3:30pm, Wednesday 8am-1:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TABLE ROCK ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SBHC
